# LOVE LIVE UNISEX

> Premium unisex salon in Mahesh Nagar, Jaipur — professional haircut, hair color, facial, makeup, bridal and grooming services. Rated 4.7 ★ by 195 customers.

LOVE LIVE UNISEX is a modern unisex salon located at D 21 Mahesh Nagar, 80 Feet Road (near JDA Park, opposite Kiran Success Point), Jaipur, Rajasthan 302015.
Phone: +91 8890497015 · WhatsApp: https://wa.me/918890497015 · Hours: Mon–Sun, 9 AM – 9 PM.
Website: https://lovelivesalon.lovable.app

## Pages
- [Home](https://lovelivesalon.lovable.app/): Overview, hero, services preview, gallery teaser.
- [About](https://lovelivesalon.lovable.app/about): Story, stats, reasons to choose us.
- [Services](https://lovelivesalon.lovable.app/services): Full menu — haircut, color, hair spa, facial, makeup, bridal, manicure, pedicure, grooming.
- [Gallery](https://lovelivesalon.lovable.app/gallery): Salon interior and stylist work.
- [Reviews](https://lovelivesalon.lovable.app/reviews): 4.7 ★ with 195 verified reviews.
- [Contact](https://lovelivesalon.lovable.app/contact): Phone, WhatsApp, address, map, FAQs.

## Key services
Haircut & Styling, Hair Spa, Hair Color (global / highlights / balayage), Beard Styling, Facial & Cleanup, HD Makeup, Manicure & Pedicure, Bridal & Party Looks, Skin Care, Grooming Packages.

## Service area
Jaipur (Mahesh Nagar, Mansarovar, Tonk Road, Gopalpura, Vaishali Nagar, Civil Lines).
